records.ety: [From an older noun, fr. F. ciel heaven, canopy, fr. L. caelum heaven, vault, arch, covering; cf. Gr. koi^los hollow.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Ceiled (sēld); p. pr. & vb. n. Ceiling.]

defs: To overlay or cover the inner side of the roof of; to furnish with a ceiling; as, to ceil a room.
quotes: The greater house he ceiled with fir tree.

defs: To line or finish a surface, as of a wall, with plaster, stucco, thin boards, or the like.
